feature.name: Host Organizers
feature.description: Orchestrates the host organizer workspace across profile and media editing, defaults spokes, insights, public preview, payouts, team membership, host identity, hosted-organizer navigation, and account exit.

actionScope.included: Host organizer route recovery, organizer and tab selection, organizer profile/media/default writes, settings-spoke navigation, analytics controls, payout onboarding/status, host-team membership, host identity, hosted-organizer navigation, and sign out.
excluded: Organizer creation internals, public membership behavior, hosted-event creation and management, Stripe-hosted onboarding UI, analytics computation, and repository authorization retain their owning features, external services, or data-contract layers.

actions.description: Leaves a signed-out organizer workspace for shared phone authentication.
Invalidates only the failed auth or hosted-organizer provider at the main route boundary.
Opens Host Create Organizer from the empty workspace.
Switches all organizer workspace tabs to another organizer the viewer hosts.
Selects Edit, Insights, or Preview while preserving each tab's scroll offset.
Persists one typed organizer identity or contact patch for the current organizer version.
Uploads and commits the current logo/photo order as one guarded organizer-media revision.
Opens Event Defaults, Live Guide, owner-only Payments, or Host Team within the organizer feature authority.
Retries the failed auth or hosted-organizer wave for a settings spoke.
Serializes optimistic activity and booking-policy default updates for the current organizer revision.
Invalidates the current organizer analytics query after a failed load.
Pulls a fresh report for the selected range and resolved device timezone.
Selects a supported analytics range and derives the matching query granularity.
Opens the selected event's Report section from a recent-event or Coach recommendation.
Leaves Insights for the host Events workspace.
Invalidates the current host payment account after a load failure.
Creates and opens one Stripe onboarding link for the selected country and currency.
Refreshes Stripe status once and invalidates the viewer's host payment-account stream.
Invalidates the viewer's host profile after a team-workspace profile failure.
Creates the signed-in viewer's host identity once when none exists.
Saves validated display-name, role-title, and bio edits for the current host-profile version.
Adds one organizer manager by normalized phone number for the current team version.
Removes a confirmed organizer manager once for the current team version.
Transfers organizer ownership to a confirmed host once for the current team version.
Invalidates the hosted-organizer list after a team-workspace failure.
Opens an owned organizer in Edit or a co-hosted organizer in the host public preview according to typed role policy.
Selects the host-identity Edit or Preview projection and gates mutations accordingly.
Pops the team spoke when possible or returns to the organizer Edit workspace.
Signs out once from the Edit-only account action and returns to Start.
